backend/main.mo: Motoko actor with a single public query function `healthCheck` that returns "Healthy" status.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two implemented features: landing page with navigation and Indian-inspired vibrant design theme with warm colors.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of frontend source files describing routing, layout, navigation, landing page, health check hook, and styling configuration.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS base styles with OKLCH color system defining neutral grayscale variables for light and dark modes.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with root div and module script loading main.tsx for the InstaBhai App.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component configuring TanStack Router with Layout and LandingPage, wrapped in ThemeProvider and QueryClientProvider.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Layout wrapper component with Navigation header, main content outlet, and footer with caffeine.ai attribution and copyright.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Responsive navigation header with InstaBhai logo, desktop menu buttons, and mobile sheet menu for Home and Explore links.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook managing backend actor creation with Internet Identity authentication, invalidating dependent queries on identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication with AuthClient, managing login state and identity lifecycle.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Custom React Query hook for backend health check with 30-second auto-refetch interval using the actor from useActor.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS with OKLCH-based Indian-inspired color palette featuring warm saffron/orange primary colors and vibrant chart colors for light and dark modes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React application entry point rendering App wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Landing page component featuring a hero section with gradient text, CTA buttons, health status badge, and feature cards showcasing InstaBhai's social platform capabilities using Lucide icons and shadcn/ui components.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom OKLCH color system, extended theme including sidebar/chart colors, custom border radius variables, Inter font family, and animation keyframes for accordion components.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file for InstaBhai App showing completed features (landing page, vibrant design theme) and pending backend health check implementation (REQ-2).
